runTitle: P11 local routing regression verification — disk-full capacity forecast wording
coveredSurfaces: monitoring routing policy execution mode and tool category
AI Engine full deterministic test suite
skippedSurfaces: Cloud Run production live P11 query

expertAssessments.rationale: P11 failure was reproduced with failing specs, then local routing/evidence tests verified 48시간/N일 디스크 포화 wording reaches monitoring-capacity-forecast deterministically.

completedImprovements.title: P11: N시간 이내 디스크 포화 표현 capacity-forecast 라우팅
completedImprovements.evidence: Added failing regression specs in 98eee810f and fixed in f8c936973. Verified npx vitest run targeted routing/evidence suite: 159 passed; cloud-run/ai-engine npm run type-check passed; cloud-run/ai-engine npm run test passed: 1535 tests; npm run lint:ci passed; git diff --check passed.
completedImprovements.note: Local deterministic verification only. Production Cloud Run verification requires the next release/tag deployment.

notes: The regression test failed before implementation with monitoring-metric-current/metrics routing for '48시간 이내에 디스크 꽉 찰까?'.
Shared CAPACITY_FULL_FORECAST_PATTERN now recognizes N분/N시간/N일/N주/N개월 + 이내/안에/내/후/뒤/까지 with 꽉/가득/다 차다 wording.
Routing policy now selects multi mode and prediction tools; supervisor domain evidence now resolves to monitoring-capacity-forecast with disk 90% default threshold.
